message:
fix(vdbe): handle nested aggregates in single-aggregate extraction fast path

Fix extract_inner_aggregate's fast path to detect when the wrapper
expression itself still contains aggregate functions (e.g. expressions
like MAX(x) - MIN(x) where both operands are aggregates).

Previously, the fast path would extract the first aggregate and assume
the wrapper was aggregate-free, which caused the second aggregate to be
silently dropped. The fix checks is_aggregate_expr(wrapper) after
extraction: if the wrapper still contains aggregates, fall through to
extract_all_inner_aggregates() which handles multi-aggregate
expressions correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
